name: Raised Waffles (10/07/93)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, dissolve the dry yeast in warm water.
2. Add the scalded milk, sugar, and salt to the yeast mixture.
3. Beat in the eggs, softened butter, and flour using a mixer until well combined.
4. Cover the mixture and let it rise for 1 1/2 hours.
5. Gently stir down the dough.
6. Cover and chill the batter in the refrigerator overnight or until ready to use.
7. When ready to prepare, gently stir down the batter and pour it into a hot waffle iron.
8. Bake until golden brown. Serve with syrup or powdered sugar.
